key_items: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most 'lopsided positive' ratio for 2026: Santiment warns of historical pullbacks after bullish spikes
Bitcoin dip buyers present but low volume lacking size to reverse downtrend; $65K downside risk looms
CFTC approves Coinbase for global crypto perps trading and JPMorgan's Dimon fights CLARITY Act passage
reasoning: Mixed macro signals with elevated bullish sentiment historically preceding pullbacks, combined with weak volume support despite dip buying activity, creates a precarious setup. Positive regulatory developments (Coinbase perps approval, Vietnam SME collateral proposal, CLARITY Act progress) are offset by technical weakness and high sentiment risk warnings from established on-chain analysts.
risks: Extreme bullish sentiment combined with low volume support suggests vulnerability to sharp 5-8% pullback toward $65K support within the 1-7 day window if macro headwinds accelerate or leverage unwinds.
